# Review Blog Post

Review a blog post for clarity, technical accuracy, and engagement.

- Use `.github/instructions/blog-post-quality-checks.instructions.md` to evaluate the post against quality standards.
- Use `.github/instructions/blog-post.instructions.md` to ensure the writing style, tone, and structure are followed.
- Check on grammar, spelling, awkward phrasing and technical inaccuracies.
- Provide specific feedback on areas for improvement, with examples and suggestions.
